request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that 78% of law enforcement experts agree that expanding domestic security powers is crucial for preventing large-scale attacks? As a young citizen, you'll be the one benefiting from these safeguards - shouldn't we have the tools to stop threats before they happen? #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
